Parisian flower shop with overflowing metal buckets crowding cobblestone sidewalk, striped awning above, morning golden hour casting long shadows across wet stones.

Wrought-iron park gates framing geometric flower beds, modern city skyline visible beyond, bird's-eye view from elevated position at sunset.
Amsterdam canal-side display with flowers in vintage crates along cobblestone waterway, arched stone bridge in background, spring morning dew glistening.
Mediterranean balcony garden with four floors of iron railings overflowing with blooms, shot from street level looking up ochre-painted building facade.

Rooftop garden with industrial galvanized planters and climbing trellises, Manhattan skyline beyond, wide shot capturing urban oasis in warm streetlamp glow.

Narrow alleyway between brick buildings, fire escape landings converted to cascading flower displays, looking up toward sky from ground level.
Georgian townhouse entrance with paired stone urns overflowing with blooms, glossy black door centered, rain-wet steps reflecting warm streetlamp glow.
